overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a white hat and red pants walking through a neon-lit dystopian city at night. The journey progresses from a covered underpass with homeless tents, through busy streets with holographic advertisements, across a wet intersection, and onto an elevated pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with homeless encampment

events.description: camera passes through a pedestrian with pink hair and teal jacket

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass, passing tents and debris on the left side

entered.detail: weathered red camping tent with blue trim on the sidewalk
large tent covered with gray and white striped tarpaulin
underside of concrete highway overpass with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting
massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements with pink and orange hues

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered urban underpass at night, passing homeless encampments with colorful tents set up along the left wall. The area is dimly lit by overhead fluorescents and the glow of a massive digital billboard on the right. The concrete ground appears wet and littered with debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level pedestrian walkway with neon storefronts and graffiti

events.description: exits covered overpass into open street with visible neon signage and building facades

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the Tyger Claws graffiti wall and approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing standing near the railing looking at street traffic

entered.detail: colorful graffiti mural featuring a stylized cat face and 'TYGER CLAWS' text on concrete wall
retail entrance with bright pink neon lighting and Japanese signage
large red neon sign reading 'BD SHACK' on building facade
red and white striped traffic barriers lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into a neon-drenched street lined with concrete barriers. The Tyger Claws gang graffiti dominates the right wall while the BD Shack neon sign glows in the distance. Pedestrians walk along the wet pavement as sparse traffic moves along the road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with holographic advertisements and vehicle traffic

events.description: begins crossing the intersection at the illuminated crosswalk with other pedestrians
waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles pass, then continuing across

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection crosswalk, waiting for traffic to clear before continuing

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
tall illuminated kiosk displaying holographic advertisements of a woman in purple
massive green steel and concrete overpass structure spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing a busy neon-lit intersection surrounded by towering holographic advertisements and the BD Shack sign visible in the distance. The wet pavement reflects the myriad of colored lights from surrounding billboards. Vehicles drive through the intersection as pedestrians cross at the striped crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings and high-end storefronts

events.description: turns right onto an elevated walkway with glass railings and neon lighting

agents.ego_description: turning right onto an elevated pedestrian walkway and continuing past storefronts

entered.detail: transparent glass safety barrier with metal posts overlooking the street below
retail entrance with bright green and pink neon signage reading 'FLESH DELIGHTS'
vertical structural column illuminated with purple neon light strips
rectangular planter with tropical vegetation and integrated lighting

segments.scene_description: Turning right onto an elevated pedestrian walkway featuring modern glass railings and neon-lit storefronts including the 'Flesh Delights' shop. The area is cleaner than the street below, with concrete planters containing vegetation and purple neon illumination. The camera moves along the walkway away from the busy intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, sheltered urban underpass into the vibrant, neon-lit expanse of a dystopian city street. It begins by gliding through a covered concrete corridor, passing colorful homeless encampments and debris under the flicker of overhead fluorescents and a massive digital billboard. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens up, transitioning from the shadows of the underpass into the open air of a rain-slicked thoroughfare. The scene then expands to reveal a street lined with concrete barriers and Tyger Claws graffiti, while the lighting shifts from industrial gloom to the saturated glow of a distant BD Shack neon sign. Finally, the view settles on a bustling urban landscape where pedestrians navigate the wet pavement alongside sparse traffic.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a chaotic, neon-drenched street intersection up onto a sleek, elevated pedestrian walkway. It begins by crossing a busy intersection where wet pavement reflects the vivid colors of towering holographic advertisements and the distant BD Shack sign. As the camera navigates through the flow of vehicles and pedestrians on the striped crosswalk, the scene shifts toward the right. The perspective then ascends and transitions onto a modern walkway characterized by glass railings and purple neon illumination, moving away from the street-level noise. Finally, the environment opens up into a cleaner architectural space, passing concrete planters and the storefront of Flesh Delights.
